block_02: Thank you for your request to provide you with a machine-readable copy of your personal data under Article 20 of GDPR.
block_03: The file that you've requested containing your {{embedded.brand_name}} data is now ready for you to download. Please find it attached.
block_04: Because this file may contain private information, you should keep it secure and take precautions when storing or sending it, or when uploading it to another service.
block_06: If you have any further questions, please let us know at
block_08: and we will provide further detail.
